name: agience-server-ophan
description: Economic operations layer: value transfers, double-entry ledger, reconciliation, invoicing, market data, resource allocation, budgeting, performance metrics, and entitlement-gated licensing operations.

tools.name: send_payment
tools.description: Initiate a value transfer (crypto or fiat)

tools.name: record_transaction
tools.description: Record an external transaction as a double-entry ledger artifact

tools.name: get_transaction
tools.description: Fetch a transaction by ID or on-chain hash

tools.name: list_transactions
tools.description: List transactions for an account over a date range

tools.name: fetch_statement
tools.description: Import a bank, exchange, or payroll statement as workspace artifacts

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a wallet, bank account, or ledger account

tools.name: reconcile_account
tools.description: Match transactions against a statement and flag discrepancies

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Generate an invoice artifact (accounts receivable)

tools.name: apply_payment
tools.description: Mark an invoice as paid and update the ledger

tools.name: run_report
tools.description: Produce a P&L, balance sheet, or cash-flow report artifact

tools.name: get_price
tools.description: Get current or historical price for a crypto or equity ticker

tools.name: get_market_data
tools.description: Fetch OHLCV data for a symbol over a date range

tools.name: track_wallet
tools.description: Monitor a blockchain wallet address for incoming activity

tools.name: get_portfolio
tools.description: Retrieve holdings from a connected brokerage or exchange

tools.name: calculate_pnl
tools.description: Calculate realised/unrealised P&L

tools.name: track_resource_usage
tools.description: Track resource consumption and allocation

tools.name: get_metrics
tools.description: Get system performance and efficiency metrics

tools.name: calculate_budget
tools.description: Calculate or project budget for a workspace or project

tools.name: resolve_license_posture
tools.description: Determine whether an organization falls inside the public self-host grant or needs a commercial license

tools.name: issue_license
tools.description: Issue licensing artifacts for an entitled operator and profile

tools.name: renew_license
tools.description: Renew an existing licensing projection and emit event artifacts

tools.name: revoke_license
tools.description: Revoke a license projection and record the compliance event

tools.name: review_installation
tools.description: Review or register installation health for a licensed deployment

tools.name: record_usage_snapshot
tools.description: Record a licensing usage snapshot and overage warnings

tools.name: run_licensing_report
tools.description: Generate a licensing summary report artifact for a workspace

AGIENCE_API_URI.description: Base URI of the agience-core backend

MCP_PORT.description: HTTP port for the MCP server
